prompts_findings.prompt_lead: Enable plan mode.  Read these artefacts end to end:  - ./CLAUDE.local.md  - .cla

risks_fired.evidence: Plan-mode invocation with structured 3-question output; 'No preamble' suppressor in-fence partially mitigates but plan-mode openers carry inherent bloat risk.
risks_fired.fix_hint: If live-test shows Claude opens with a contextual framing paragraph, add 'Answer each question directly — no framing, no contextual summary first' before the question list.

risks_fired.evidence: 'No preamble' explicit suppressor in fence reduces risk below blocking threshold.
risks_fired.fix_hint: Carries forward; no action needed unless live-test shows violation.

risks_fired.evidence: Body callout carve-out applied: 'Read what comes back the way you read any plan. Push back where the proposals miss the codebase situation Claude cannot see' names failure mode + gives recovery move + grants student agency. Downgraded from med to low.
risks_fired.fix_hint: Body callout is sufficient; no in-fence change needed.

risks_fired.evidence: Fresh-session destination (per parenthetical chip 'fresh session in the same repo') provides structural mitigation.
